session_focus.summary: Short session: fixed the two slowest parts of session-wrap flagged by the user (pre-commit validator running unconditionally, pre-push security auditor scanning all 40+ skill dirs on every push). Edited the hook generator (setup-git-hooks.ps1, single source of truth per its own 'do not edit' header on the installed hooks) to (1) skip the pre-commit validator entirely when staged files touch neither skills/ nor utilities/, and (2) scope the pre-push auditor to only the skill dirs that changed vs upstream (git diff @{u}...HEAD), falling back to a full scan when there's no upstream to diff against. Reinstalled hooks via -Action Install, verified both live. Committed (a75aea1) and pushed after a non-fast-forward rejection (release-bot had cut v2.8.3 concurrently) — rebased clean via stash/pull-rebase/push, caught and resolved a live-daemon race where cowork-auto-sync regenerated 7 tracked report files mid-stash (verified byte-identical before dropping the redundant stash, no data lost). release-bot cut v2.8.4 in response.
